# Daily Report — 2026-06-12

## Task Completed
Added `list_catalog_item_user_criteria` tool to query catalog item visibility rules from the
ServiceNow user criteria junction tables. The tool targets `sc_cat_item_user_criteria_mtom`
(allow-list) or `sc_cat_item_user_criteria_no_mtom` (deny-list) based on the `visibility`
parameter. Supports filtering by `catalog_item_id` or `user_criteria_id`, with full pagination
(`has_more` / `next_offset`). A `_format_criteria_link` helper normalises reference dict and
scalar values into flat fields (`catalog_item_id`, `catalog_item_name`, `user_criteria_id`,
`user_criteria_name`). Registered in `catalog_builder` and `full` packages.

## Test Results
- Total tests: 1595
- Coverage: 92% total; user_criteria_tools.py 100%
- All passing: yes

## Security
Pre-existing system package advisories (setuptools CVE-2024-6345/PYSEC-2025-49,
urllib3 PYSEC-2026-141/142, wheel CVE-2026-24049). No new vulnerabilities introduced.

## Files Changed
- `src/servicenow_mcp/tools/user_criteria_tools.py` — added imports, `ListCatalogItemUserCriteriaParams`, `_format_criteria_link`, `list_catalog_item_user_criteria`
- `src/servicenow_mcp/tools/__init__.py` — import + `__all__` entry
- `src/servicenow_mcp/utils/tool_utils.py` — import + `get_tool_definitions` entry
- `config/tool_packages.yaml` — added to `catalog_builder` and `full` packages
- `tests/test_user_criteria_tools.py` — 21 new tests (3 for helper, 18 for main function)

## Next Up
Add escalate_incident tool (PATCH incident priority and assignment_group with audit note)
